reasoning.research_depth: Expert-level content with academic credibility. Features actual computer science researchers and professors explaining concepts from their domain of expertise.
reasoning.signal_noise: Pure content delivery with minimal filler. Academic interview format keeps the focus on substantive technical content throughout.
reasoning.originality: Competent execution of the expert interview format. The channel's strength is in sourcing quality experts rather than novel presentation.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Highly evergreen content covering fundamental computer science concepts that remain relevant regardless of technological trends.
